CORRECT.question: Who discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains?
CORRECT.model_response: Ernest Rutherford and Frederick Soddy discovered radioactive decay chains in 1902-1903. While Marie and Pierre Curie had discovered radioactive elements earlier, Rutherford and Soddy were the first to identify and explain that radioactive elements could transform into other radioactive elements through a series of successive decays, forming decay chains.
